lifecycle_badge_vocabulary.meaning: Currently active in the current registry; does not imply a betting edge.
Evaluated and rejected; remains visible in historical replay views.
Formerly used, now retired; historical rows remain visible.
Evidence-only row or snapshot entry that should remain visible.
Legacy snapshot state; use the live registry status alongside it.

filter_semantics.default_behavior: include all rows/cards by default; filters narrow the view but do not hide historical entries automatically
filter_semantics.lifecycle_filter: badge/filter only; never an exclusion rule
filter_semantics.registry_filter: can show current-registry-only rows, but should never erase historical snapshot rows unless user explicitly asks
filter_semantics.snapshot_filter: can reveal historical snapshot state side-by-side with current registry status
filter_semantics.lottery_filter: scope by lottery_type without changing visibility rules
filter_semantics.artifact_only_filter: must keep artifact-only rows visible by default and explicitly labeled

no_exclusion_rules: Do not exclude strategies because they are retired, rejected, offline, observation, unresolved, or artifact-only.
Do not hide replay-backed historical rows when lifecycle is not ONLINE.
Do not infer deployability from inventory presence, row counts, or historical classifications alone.
Do not treat P232A as live state; it is a historical snapshot and must not replace the current registry SSOT.
Do not hide BIG_LOTTO add-on / canonical split information; display it as evidence state.

stale_snapshot_warning.message: P232A is a historical replay snapshot from 20260604 and is stale relative to the live registry SSOT published in P250A/P250B.
stale_snapshot_warning.dashboard_behavior: show both states together, with the current registry as primary and the snapshot as evidence context.

no_betting_advice_notice.message: This dashboard is an evidence contract, not betting advice.
no_claims: GREEN canonical randomness remains a data-quality result, not a signal.
Current inventory has no active deployable candidate.
